testcase.name: test_main_convert

failure.message: TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_jsonfmt.JSONFormatToolTestCase testMethod=test_main_convert>
@patch('sys.stdout', StdOut()) def test_main_convert(self): # test json to toml with patch.multiple(sys, argv=['jf', '-f', 'toml', JSON_FILE]): > jsonfmt.main()
test/test_jsonfmt.py:422: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:339: in main output(output_fp, formated, fmt) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
output_fp = <test_jsonfmt.StdOut object at 0x1041c6a70> text = 'name = "Bob"
age = 23
gender = "çº¯çˆ·ä»¬"
money = 3.1415926
[[actions]]
name = "eating"
calorie = 1294.9
date = "20...ting"
calorie = -2375
date = "2023-04-27"

[[actions]]
name = "sleeping"
calorie = -420.5
date = "2023-05-15"
' fmt = 'toml'
def output(output_fp: IO, text: str, fmt: str): if hasattr(output_fp, 'name') and output_fp.name == '<stdout>': if output_fp.isatty(): # highlight the text when output to TTY device > syntax = Syntax(text, language=fmt) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'
jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:212: TypeError

testcase.name: test_main_with_file

failure.message: TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_jsonfmt.JSONFormatToolTestCase testMethod=test_main_with_file>
@patch.multiple(sys, argv=['jf', '-i', 't', '-p', 'actions[*].name', JSON_FILE, YAML_FILE]) @patch.multiple(sys, stdout=StdOut()) def test_main_with_file(self): json_output = color('[
	"eating",
	"sporting",
	"sleeping"
]', 'json') yaml_output = color('- eating
- sporting
- sleeping', 'yaml') > jsonfmt.main()
test/test_jsonfmt.py:377: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:339: in main output(output_fp, formated, fmt) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
output_fp = <test_jsonfmt.StdOut object at 0x1041c6830> text = '[
	"eating",
	"sporting",
	"sleeping"
]
', fmt = 'json'
def output(output_fp: IO, text: str, fmt: str): if hasattr(output_fp, 'name') and output_fp.name == '<stdout>': if output_fp.isatty(): # highlight the text when output to TTY device > syntax = Syntax(text, language=fmt) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'
jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:212: TypeError

testcase.name: test_main_with_stdin

failure.message: TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_jsonfmt.JSONFormatToolTestCase testMethod=test_main_with_stdin>
def test_main_with_stdin(self): with patch.multiple(sys, argv=['jf', '-f', 'yaml'], stdin=StdIn('["a", "b"]'), stdout=StdOut()): expected_output = color('- a\n- b', 'yaml') > jsonfmt.main()
test/test_jsonfmt.py:386: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:339: in main output(output_fp, formated, fmt) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
output_fp = <test_jsonfmt.StdOut object at 0x1043bab90>, text = '- a\n- b\n' fmt = 'yaml'
def output(output_fp: IO, text: str, fmt: str): if hasattr(output_fp, 'name') and output_fp.name == '<stdout>': if output_fp.isatty(): # highlight the text when output to TTY device > syntax = Syntax(text, language=fmt) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'
jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:212: TypeError

testcase.name: test_output

failure.message: TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_jsonfmt.JSONFormatToolTestCase testMethod=test_output>
def test_output(self): # output JSON to clipboard jsonfmt.TEMP_CLIPBOARD.seek(0) jsonfmt.TEMP_CLIPBOARD.truncate() jsonfmt.output(jsonfmt.TEMP_CLIPBOARD, JSON_TEXT, 'json') jsonfmt.output(jsonfmt.TEMP_CLIPBOARD, XML_TEXT, 'xml') jsonfmt.TEMP_CLIPBOARD.seek(0) self.assertEqual(jsonfmt.TEMP_CLIPBOARD.read(), JSON_TEXT + '

' + XML_TEXT)
# output TOML to file (temp file) with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='r+') as tmpfile: jsonfmt.output(tmpfile, TOML_TEXT, 'toml') tmpfile.seek(0) self.assertEqual(tmpfile.read(), TOML_TEXT)
# output YAML to stdout (mock) with patch('sys.stdout', StdOut()): > jsonfmt.output(sys.stdout, YAML_TEXT, 'yaml')
test/test_jsonfmt.py:311: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
output_fp = <test_jsonfmt.StdOut object at 0x1043bb010> text = "name: Bob
age: 23
gender: çº¯çˆ·ä»¬
money: 3.1415926
actions:
- name: eating
 calorie: 1294.9
 date: '2021-03-02'
- name: sporting
 calorie: -2375
 date: '2023-04-27'
- name: sleeping
 calorie: -420.5
 date: '2023-05-15'
" fmt = 'yaml'
def output(output_fp: IO, text: str, fmt: str): if hasattr(output_fp, 'name') and output_fp.name == '<stdout>': if output_fp.isatty(): # highlight the text when output to TTY device > syntax = Syntax(text, language=fmt) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: Syntax.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'language'
jsonfmt/jsonfmt.py:212: TypeError
